title: British Columbia Transport Sector Quarterly Trend Sheet - Q1 2025
content: In Q1 2025, ZEV sales as a percentage of total vehicle sales saw a quarter-over-quarter (QoQ) decline, dropping from 21.18% in Q4 2024 to 17.77%. On a YoY basis, ZEV sales recorded a 11.54% decline. The share of BEVs within total ZEV sales recorded an increase, rising from 72.72% in Q4 2024 to 73.14% in Q1 2025. ZEV sales per 1,000 people declined from 7.40 in Q4 2024 to 6.24 in Q1 2025. On a YoY basis, BEV sales declined by 14.13%.
author: Aru Somya
